title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS OF THE GREATER SANTIAM THE CLUB BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 305 S 5th Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Ages 3-18 Hours: After-School Programs: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-6pm Early Release: Wednesday noon-6pm Activity times may vary Email (541) 258-7105 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 258-7105 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $200 monthly fee, $15 daily rate or a $100 for 10 day punch card (scholarships available) DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Lebanon and Sweet Home SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Century Park Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
